title: Test GLM API Connection and Notification System
job:
Test that the GLM API connection and notification system are both working correctly.

Tasks:
1. Verify the GLM-4.7 API connection is still working
2. Create a brief success report at `logs/notification-test.md`
3. The notification workflow should trigger after this job completes, sending a notification to the event handler

Context: User has added APP_URL and GH_WEBHOOK_SECRET to enable job completion notifications.
